title: Cold Exposure in Murine Models
author: Bianca Hemmeryckx
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.kbbcsin

steps.title: Determine the body weight of 8-weeks...
steps.instruction: Determine the body weight of 8-weeks old male mice (C57BL/6J, C57BL/6N or gene-deficient mice with control littermates)

steps.title: House the mice individually with access to standard chow (10
steps.instruction: House the mice individually with access to standard chow (10.9 kJ/g) and drinking water ad libitum.

steps.title: Expose the mice to cold temperatures...
steps.instruction: Expose the mice to cold temperatures (4-8°C) for 72 hours or 2 weeks by transferring the cages to a ventilated cooling unit (Friginox, France) with a 12-hour light/dark cycle (7AM/7PM).

steps.title: Replace drinking water and change the...
steps.instruction: Replace drinking water and change the cages with the standard chow bi-weekly. Check the health of the animals every day.

steps.title: Record food intake, body weight and...
steps.instruction: Record food intake, body weight and body temperature (rectal probe, TR-100, Fine Science Tools) upon changing of the cages.

steps.title: After 72 hours or 2 weeks,...
steps.instruction: After 72 hours or 2 weeks, fast animals for 6 hours (7:30 AM – 1:30 PM).

steps.title: Determine blood glucose levels on a...
steps.instruction: Determine blood glucose levels on a drop of blood taken from the nicked tail of a free-moving mouse using the Accu-Chek Aviva glucose meter (06988563016, Roche Diagnostics) and Accu-Chek Aviva glucose strips (06453970, Roche Diagnostics)

steps.title: Sacrifice animals by intraperitoneal injection of...
steps.instruction: Sacrifice animals by intraperitoneal injection of 60 mg/kg sodium pentobarbital (Nembutal) or Dolethal. -Nembutal (60 mg/ml): we make 10x dilution with saline.-Dolethal (200 mg/ml): we make 30x dilution with saline. Nembutal 60 mg/ml Contributed by users Dolethal 200 mg/ml Contributed by users

steps.title: When animals are asleep, collect blood...
steps.instruction: When animals are asleep, collect blood from the retro-orbital sinus on trisodium citrate and processed for plasma (http://dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.j9dcr26). Store plasma in aliquots at -80°C.

steps.title: Immobilize the animals, cut open the...
steps.instruction: Immobilize the animals, cut open the chest and wash out the heart and the entire circulatory system with saline by putting a perfusion needle in the apex (left ventricle). Make a small cut in the right atrium to allow blood to flow out. *Microflex Infusion set, orange: Ref. 240.05, Vygon Vet

steps.title: Make a midline incision in the...
steps.instruction: Make a midline incision in the skin and make a incision at the height of the hind limbs.

steps.title: Pull skin to the side so...
steps.instruction: Pull skin to the side so the inguinal subcutaneous white adipose tissue (sWAT) depots are visible. Remove the internal lymph nodes. Dissect out the sWAT depots.

steps.title: Make a midline incision in the...
steps.instruction: Make a midline incision in the muscle layer to open the abdominal cavity.

steps.title: Locate the intra-abdominal gonadal (GON) WAT depots and liver
steps.instruction: Locate the intra-abdominal gonadal (GON) WAT depots and liver. Removed them.

steps.title: Flip the mouse, locate the interscapular...
steps.instruction: Flip the mouse, locate the interscapular brown adipose tissue depot and remove it.

steps.title: Weigh all dissected organs
steps.instruction: Weigh all dissected organs.

steps.title: Make portions of each tissue for...
steps.instruction: Make portions of each tissue for RNA, protein extraction or histology.

steps.title: Snap-freeze the portions for RNA and...
steps.instruction: Snap-freeze the portions for RNA and protein extraction and store at -80°C.

steps.title: Process the portions for histology (see separate protocol)
steps.instruction: Process the portions for histology (see separate protocol).

steps.title: Clean dissection material and bench with...
steps.instruction: Clean dissection material and bench with Virkon S, detergent, water and 70% ethanol. Virkon™ S 5O tablets/bottle Fisher Scientific Catalog #NC9821357

steps.title: Dispose of the animal body according to internal institutional guidelines
steps.instruction: Dispose of the animal body according to internal institutional guidelines.
